title: nepeta × boissieri
intro: Nepeta × boissieri, also known as catmint, is a hybrid perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nepeta × boissieri include relief from anxiety and insomnia, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. The herb can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation and alleviate various health issues.
